'''[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Nethius''' was [[Darknon Station]]'s customs official and security guard.

==Biography==
[[File:Sergeant_Nethius_2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Nethius was [[Darknon Station]]'s only security guard.]]

Nethius was also an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] sent to Darknon Station to monitor spacer traffic and alert Imperial authorities of any suspicious visitors or activity. He was trained as a soldier and special operative but hid his true intentions well.

Nethius protected the location of a secret [[Imperial research station (Itani Nebula)|Imperial research station]] deep within the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]]. Imperial patrol starships occasionally dropped supplies to the Darknon Station and proceeded to the Itani Nebula. Nethius had a friendly demeanor which he used to make casual queries to spacers. In doing so he intended to discover their true intentions and find out whether they posed any threat to the research station.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' {{1stm}}

[[File:Imperial_research_station.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The [[Imperial research station (Itani Nebula)|Imperial research station]] hidden in the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]] that Nethius protected the location of.]]
